summary: U1, U2, U3 Admin Panel Features Testing Complete - All 21 backend tests PASSED, All UI tests PASSED. Features fully functional: Dashboard KPIs with clickable navigation, User edit modal, Password reset link generation.

u1_dashboard_kpis.dashboard_stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns all required KPI fields
u1_dashboard_kpis.new_7d_counter: PASS - Returns integer count of users registered in last 7 days
u1_dashboard_kpis.recent_logins_24h: PASS - Returns integer count of logins in last 24 hours
u1_dashboard_kpis.online_users: PASS - Returns integer count of users active in last 5 minutes
u1_dashboard_kpis.kpi_click_new7d: PASS - Navigates to Users with __new_7d__ filter
u1_dashboard_kpis.kpi_click_login24h: PASS - Navigates to Users with __login_24h__ filter
u1_dashboard_kpis.online_kpi_green_border: PASS - 'Online ora' KPI box has green border (#10B981) when users online

u1_filter_dropdown.nuovi_ultimi_7gg_option: PASS - Filter option exists with value '__new_7d__'
u1_filter_dropdown.login_ultime_24h_option: PASS - Filter option exists with value '__login_24h__'
u1_filter_dropdown.filter_auto_select: PASS - Filters pre-selected when navigating from Dashboard KPIs

u2_edit_user_details.dettagli_button: PASS - 73 'Dettagli' buttons found in users table
u2_edit_user_details.modal_username_field: PASS - Editable username field present in modal
u2_edit_user_details.modal_email_field: PASS - Editable email field present in modal
u2_edit_user_details.invalid_username_rejection: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid usernames (<3 chars, special chars)
u2_edit_user_details.no_updates_rejection: PASS - Returns 400 when no updates provided

u3_password_reset.generate_link_button: PASS - Button visible in user details modal (for non-Google users)
u3_password_reset.generate_link_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/rbac/users/{id}/reset-password-link returns URL with token
u3_password_reset.reset_submit_valid_token: PASS - POST /api/reset-password with valid token changes password
u3_password_reset.reset_page_validations: PASS - Client-side validation for password mismatch and length

verified_features: U1: Dashboard displays 'Online ora' KPI box with green border (#10B981) when users are online
U1: 'Nuovi 7gg' card on dashboard is clickable and navigates to Users page with '__new_7d__' filter selected
U1: 'Login 24h' card on dashboard is clickable and navigates to Users page with '__login_24h__' filter selected
U1: Users filter dropdown has 'Nuovi ultimi 7gg' and 'Login ultime 24h' filter options
U2: Each user row in the Users table has a 'Dettagli' button
U2: Clicking 'Dettagli' opens a modal with editable username and email fields
U2: PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id} endpoint successfully updates username
U2: PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id} endpoint successfully updates email
U2: PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id} endpoint rejects invalid usernames (400)
U2: PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id} endpoint rejects duplicate emails (409)
U3: 'Genera Link Reset Password' button is visible in user details modal
U3: POST /api/rbac/users/{user_id}/reset-password-link generates a valid reset URL
U3: GET /api/reset-password page loads with reset form
U3: POST /api/reset-password with valid token changes the password
U3: POST /api/reset-password with invalid token returns error (400)
U3: POST /api/reset-password with used token returns error (400)
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id} endpoint has proper validation for username format (3-20 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)
Password reset tokens use SHA256 hashing for storage and 24-hour expiry
Previous tokens are invalidated when generating new reset link for same user
Online users tracked via last_activity field with 5-minute window
context_for_next_testing_agent: U1, U2, U3 features fully tested and working. Dashboard KPIs clickable with correct filter navigation. User edit modal with username/email fields working. Password reset link generation and submission working with proper token validation. Test user ilio@raimondi.it used for testing - password may have been changed during tests but was restored to 'password123'.

mocked_apis_list: Password reset link delivery is MOCKED - displayed to admin for manual delivery, no email service integrated
